'''Been L'toth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dornean/Legends|Dornean]], the son of [[Kiles L'toth]]. By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he had taken his father's place as director for the [[Astrographic Survey Institute]].
